criteria.text: No third-party font CDN at runtime: index.html and the bundle contain no fonts.googleapis.com / fonts.gstatic.com links or requests (the CDN link tags are removed)

Fonts self-hosted and wired: Fraunces + JetBrains Mono are provided by bundled @fontsource packages imported at the app entry (main.tsx), served from our own origin; --font-display / --font-mono tokens still name those families
Accent + headings unchanged (no regression): the crimson primary (#c0002a) accent and the Fraunces heading treatment remain exactly as today — self-hosting changes the font source, not the look
